response.justification: Mohammed is a highly accomplished Staff Software Engineer with over 15 years of experience, making him vastly overqualified for this entry-level/junior role. While his technical background perfectly matches the required stack (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, LLMs), hiring a candidate of this seniority for an entry-level position typically leads to severe salary misalignments, role expectation issues, and high flight risk.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js, perfectly matching the core stack requirements.
Strong advocate for clean architecture, demonstrating deep knowledge of TDD and software craftsmanship.
Brings highly relevant nice-to-have experience with AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/AI integrations.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level/junior position with over 15 years of professional experience.
High probability of a significant salary expectation mismatch given his current Staff Engineer title.
Potential flight risk or dissatisfaction with the limited scope of junior-level responsibilities.
